full_text:
Zhou Xin (Daming) 周昕 (大明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Xin (周昕), styledDaming (大明), was born in Kuaiji. Well read, he resigned his position rather then have Yuan Shu to harm his people. Zhou Xin was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Yuan Shao, and Wang Lang. Zhou Xin lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographyCollaborative Works
Zhou Xin, styled Daming, originally served under Liu Yao. Defended against Sun Ce when he came south to attack using Yuan Shu’s troops. He fought Wu Jing, one of Yuan Shu’s officers, but was defeated by Sun Ce. After Liu Yao’s defeat, he fled to Wang Lang. When Sun Ce continued his campaign, he was killed in battle (in the novel, by Sun Ce himself).
